key_items: Spot Bitcoin ETFs bleed $1B in a week, snapping six-week inflow run - capital rotation to AI stocks
US CLARITY Act brings regulatory clarity but Santiment warns crowd euphoria typically precedes reversals
US Treasury yields surge to new highs, pushing Bitcoin below $80,000 resistance - bond market reasserting control
reasoning: Bitcoin faces conflicting headwinds: positive regulatory momentum from CLARITY Act and strong institutional adoption signals (Mubadala +16%, Winklevoss $100M bet, Trump family purchases) are offset by rising Treasury yields, ETF outflows ($1B), and macro uncertainty around inflation/Fed rate expectations. The market is caught between genuine bullish catalysts and technical weakness, creating a consolidation range rather than a directional breakout over the 1-7 day swing window.
risks: Unexpected Fed hawkish pivot or hotter-than-expected inflation data could trigger liquidations in leveraged positions and accelerate ETF outflows below the $80,000 support level.
